qa_pairs.question: What is the Metrix portal?
qa_pairs.answer: The Metrix portal is a website designed for Alliance users.

qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of the Metrix portal?
qa_pairs.answer: The Metrix portal collects information on compute nodes and management servers to interactively generate data, allowing users to track their resource usage in real time.

qa_pairs.question: What types of resources can users track using the Metrix portal?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can track their resource usage for CPUs, GPUs, memory, and filesystems.

qa_pairs.question: In what timeframe can resource usage be tracked?
qa_pairs.answer: Resource usage can be tracked in real time.

qa_pairs.question: What is the URL for the Metrix portal on Rorqual?
qa_pairs.answer: The URL for the Metrix portal on Rorqual is https://metrix.rorqual.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What is the URL for the Metrix portal on Narval?
qa_pairs.answer: The URL for the Metrix portal on Narval is https://portail.narval.calculquebec.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What is the URL for the Metrix portal on Nibi?
qa_pairs.answer: The URL for the Metrix portal on Nibi is https://portal.nibi.sharcnet.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What kind of graphs are available under the 'Filesystem performance' section?
qa_pairs.answer: Under 'Filesystem performance', graphs for bandwidths and metadata operations are available.

qa_pairs.question: What viewing options are provided for filesystem performance graphs?
qa_pairs.answer: Viewing options for filesystem performance graphs include last week, last day, and last hour.

qa_pairs.question: What usage statistics are presented under the 'Login nodes' tab?
qa_pairs.answer: Under 'Login nodes', usage statistics for CPUs, memory, system load, and network are presented.

qa_pairs.question: What viewing options are available for login node usage statistics?
qa_pairs.answer: Viewing options for login node usage statistics include last week, last day, and last hour.

qa_pairs.question: What kind of statistics does the 'Scheduler' tab show?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'Scheduler' tab shows statistics for the cluster's allocated cores and GPUs.

qa_pairs.question: What viewing options are available for scheduler statistics?
qa_pairs.answer: Viewing options for scheduler statistics include last week, last day, and last hour.

qa_pairs.question: What do the graphs under 'Scientific software' display?
qa_pairs.answer: The graphs under 'Scientific software' show the most frequently used software, along with CPU cores and GPUs.

qa_pairs.question: What kind of statistics are shown under the 'Data transfer nodes' tab?
qa_pairs.answer: Bandwidth statistics for data transfer nodes are shown under this tab.

qa_pairs.question: What information can be found under the 'User portal' tab?
qa_pairs.answer: Under the 'User portal' tab, users can find their quotas for filesystems and their 10 last jobs.

qa_pairs.question: How can a user view details for a specific job in the 'User portal'?
qa_pairs.answer: A user can select a job by its number to see the details.

qa_pairs.question: How can a user access the 'Job statistics' tab from the 'User portal'?
qa_pairs.answer: By clicking on '(More details)' in the 'User portal', a user is redirected to the 'Job statistics' tab.

qa_pairs.question: What does the first block in the 'Job statistics' section display?
qa_pairs.answer: The first block in 'Job statistics' shows your current usage, including CPU cores, memory, and GPUs.

qa_pairs.question: What do the current usage statistics in 'Job statistics' represent?
qa_pairs.answer: These statistics represent the average usage by all currently running jobs.

qa_pairs.question: What type of graph is available in 'Job statistics' after the current usage block?
qa_pairs.answer: A graph showing the average usage for the last few days is available.

qa_pairs.question: How is filesystem activity represented in 'Job statistics'?
qa_pairs.answer: Filesystem activity is represented by two graphs: one showing the number of disk write commands (input/output operations per second) and another showing the amount of data transferred to servers (Bandwidth).

qa_pairs.question: What does the section after filesystem activity show regarding jobs in 'Job statistics'?
qa_pairs.answer: This section shows all jobs a user has already started, which are currently running or pending.

qa_pairs.question: How can users filter jobs in the 'Job statistics' section?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can filter jobs by their status (e.g., OOM, completed, running) in the top left corner.

qa_pairs.question: How can users search for jobs in the 'Job statistics' section?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can search by job ID or job name in the top right corner.

qa_pairs.question: How can users navigate between pages in the 'Job statistics' section?
qa_pairs.answer: In the bottom right corner, there is an option to quickly navigate between pages by performing multiple jumps.

qa_pairs.question: What information is displayed at the top of a 'CPU jobs' page?
qa_pairs.answer: At the top of a 'CPU jobs' page, you see the job name, its number, your username, and the status.

qa_pairs.question: How can users view details of their submission script for a CPU job?
qa_pairs.answer: Details of the submission script are displayed by clicking on 'Show submitted job script'.

qa_pairs.question: When is the submission script not available for a CPU job?
qa_pairs.answer: If the job was launched in interactive mode, the submission script will not be available.

qa_pairs.question: How can users view the working directory and submission command for a CPU job?
qa_pairs.answer: The working directory and submission command can be seen by clicking on 'Show submit command'.

qa_pairs.question: How can users display information on their CPU account in the 'CPU jobs' section?
qa_pairs.answer: To display information on your CPU account, click on your account number.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users compare allocated and used resources for a CPU job?
qa_pairs.answer: In the 'Ressources' section, users can see the resources used by their job by comparing the 'Allocated' and 'Used' columns for listed parameters.

qa_pairs.question: What does the 'CPU' graph for a CPU job illustrate?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'CPU' graph shows the CPU cores requested by the user, over time.

qa_pairs.question: Can users select specific cores to view on the CPU graph for a CPU job?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, on the right side of the CPU graph, users can select the cores they want to see.

qa_pairs.question: When is the 'CPU' graph not available for CPU jobs?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'CPU' graph is not available for very short jobs.
